ucs.title: [LLM] Silk Typhoon (HAFNIUM) ProxyLogon — w3wp.exe spawning shell + ASPX webshell drop in Exchange virtual directories
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical HAFNIUM/Silk Typhoon Exchange post-exploitation chain: SSRF via CVE-2021-26855 leads w3wp.exe (the Exchange worker process) to spawn cmd/powershell or write China-Chopper-style ASPX webshells into OWA/ECP/aspnet_client paths. Specifically tied to the Operation Exchange Marauder cluster (Microsoft = Silk Typhoon / HAFNIUM, CrowdStrike = MURKY PANDA-adjacent activity).
ucs.splunk: (tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_name) as child_proc from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="w3wp.exe" Processes.parent_process="*MSExchange*" Processes.process_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","powershell_ise.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","whoami.exe","systeminfo.exe","ipconfig.exe","nltest.exe","tasklist.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","procdump.exe","makecab.exe","7z.exe","rar.exe","wmic.exe") by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`) | append [tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Filesystem.file_path) as path values(Filesystem.process_name) as proc from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.process_name="w3wp.exe" (Filesystem.file_path="*\\inetpub\\wwwroot\\aspnet_client\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\FrontEnd\\HttpProxy\\owa\\auth\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\FrontEnd\\HttpProxy\\ecp\\auth\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\ClientAccess\\Owa\\auth\\*") (Filesystem.file_name="*.aspx" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.asp" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.ashx") by host Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_path | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)`] | stats values(*) as * by host | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// Silk Typhoon / HAFNIUM ProxyLogon post-ex: w3wp child + ASPX shell drop
let Lookback = 14d;
let ExchangeChildren = dynamic(["cmd.exe","powershell.exe","powershell_ise.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","whoami.exe","systeminfo.exe","ipconfig.exe","nltest.exe","tasklist.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","procdump.exe","makecab.exe","7z.exe","rar.exe","wmic.exe"]);
let ShellSpawn =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "w3wp.exe"
    | where InitiatingProcessCommandLine has "MSExchange"          // Exchange app pool only
    | where FileName in~ (ExchangeChildren)
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              Child = FileName, ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine, SHA256;
let WebshellDrop =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "w3wp.exe"
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
    | where FileName endswith ".aspx" or FileName endswith ".asp" or FileName endswith ".ashx"
    | where FolderPath has_any (
        @"\inetpub\wwwroot\aspnet_client\",
        @"\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\owa\auth\",
        @"\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\ecp\auth\",
        @"\ClientAccess\Owa\auth\",
        @"\V15\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
              DropperCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
union isfuzzy=true ShellSpawn, WebshellDrop
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Silk Typhoon / HAFNIUM ProxyLogon post-ex on Sentinel (SecurityEvent 4688 + ASIM file events)
let Lookback = 14d;
let ExchangeChildren = dynamic(["cmd.exe","powershell.exe","powershell_ise.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","whoami.exe","systeminfo.exe","ipconfig.exe","nltest.exe","tasklist.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","procdump.exe","makecab.exe","7z.exe","rar.exe","wmic.exe"]);
let ShellSpawn =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where ParentProcessName endswith "w3wp.exe"
    | where CommandLine has "MSExchange" or ParentProcessName has "MSExchange"
    | extend ChildName = tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1])
    | where tolower(ChildName) in (ExchangeChildren)
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName;
let WebshellDrop =
    ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where ActingProcessName endswith "w3wp.exe"
    | where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
    | where TargetFileName endswith ".aspx" or TargetFileName endswith ".asp" or TargetFileName endswith ".ashx"
    | where TargetFilePath has_any (
        @"\inetpub\wwwroot\aspnet_client\",
        @"\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\owa\auth\",
        @"\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\ecp\auth\",
        @"\ClientAccess\Owa\auth\",
        @"\V15\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\")
    | project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, TargetFileName, TargetFilePath, TargetFileSHA256, ActingProcessCommandLine;
union isfuzzy=true ShellSpawn, WebshellDrop
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.rationale: w3wp.exe (Exchange app pool) spawning interpreters/recon binaries OR writing .aspx into the OWA/ECP/aspnet_client virtual directories is the exact behavioural fingerprint Microsoft attributed to HAFNIUM/Silk Typhoon during Operation Exchange Marauder (Mar 2021 ProxyLogon). It is not a generic web-shell template — the parent-image lock to w3wp + the Exchange-specific drop paths + the recon child-se

ucs.title: [LLM] Silk Typhoon credential dumping — Procdump/comsvcs.dll MiniDump of LSASS from Exchange or IT-admin host
ucs.description: Hunts the credential-theft step that Silk Typhoon (HAFNIUM) consistently performed after webshell access: dumping LSASS via procdump.exe, comsvcs.dll MiniDump, or rundll32 invoking dbghelp/MiniDumpW, then staging the .dmp into ProgramData / Temp / Public for exfil. Microsoft DART explicitly tied this LSASS-dump-then-stage chain to HAFNIUM Exchange intrusions and to the 2024 Silk Typhoon IT-supply-chain pivots.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process="*comsvcs.dll*MiniDump*" OR (Processes.process_name="rundll32.exe" AND Processes.process="*MiniDump*") OR (Processes.process_name IN ("procdump.exe","procdump64.exe") AND Processes.process="*lsass*") OR (Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" AND (Processes.process="*MiniDumpWriteDump*" OR Processes.process="*Out-Minidump*")) OR (Processes.process_name="tasklist.exe" AND Processes.process="*lsass*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*process*lsass*")) Processes.user!="*$" by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// Silk Typhoon (HAFNIUM) — LSASS dumping via comsvcs / procdump / MiniDumpWriteDump
let Lookback = 14d;
let LsassDump =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName =~ "rundll32.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "comsvcs.dll" and ProcessCommandLine has "MiniDump")
         or (FileName in~ ("procdump.exe","procdump64.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has "lsass")
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("MiniDumpWriteDump","Out-Minidump","Invoke-Mimikatz","sekurlsa"))
         or (FileName =~ "tasklist.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "lsass")
         or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "process" and ProcessCommandLine has "lsass")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
              Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName, ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              Grandparent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName, IsRemote = IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession;
// Stage 2 — .dmp file written under common Silk Typhoon staging paths
let DumpStaged =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed")
    | where FileName endswith ".dmp" or FileName endswith ".bin" or FileName matches regex @"(?i)lsass.*\.(dmp|bin|zip|rar|7z|cab)$"
    | where FolderPath has_any (@"\ProgramData\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\Temp\", @"\inetpub\", @"\PerfLogs\")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
              DropperFile = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              DropperCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              DropperParent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName;
union isfuzzy=true LsassDump, DumpStaged
| extend ExchangeContext = iff(InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "w3wp.exe" or DropperFile =~ "w3wp.exe" or DropperParent =~ "w3wp.exe", "yes", "no")
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Silk Typhoon LSASS dumping via comsvcs/procdump/MiniDumpWriteDump on Sentinel
let Lookback = 14d;
let LsassDump =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend ChildName = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
    | where (ChildName == "rundll32.exe" and CommandLine has "comsvcs.dll" and CommandLine has "MiniDump")
         or (ChildName in ("procdump.exe","procdump64.exe") and CommandLine has "lsass")
         or (ChildName in ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine has "MiniDumpWriteDump" or CommandLine has "Out-Minidump" or CommandLine has "Invoke-Mimikatz" or CommandLine has "sekurlsa"))
         or (ChildName == "tasklist.exe" and CommandLine has "lsass")
         or (ChildName == "wmic.exe" and CommandLine has "process" and CommandLine has "lsass")
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName;
let DumpStaged =
    ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed")
    | where TargetFileName endswith ".dmp" or TargetFileName matches regex @"(?i)lsass.*\.(dmp|bin|zip|rar|7z|cab)$"
    | where TargetFilePath has_any (@"\ProgramData\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\Temp\", @"\inetpub\", @"\PerfLogs\")
    | project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, TargetFileName, TargetFilePath, TargetFileSHA256, ActingProcessName, ActingProcessCommandLine;
union isfuzzy=true LsassDump, DumpStaged
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Silk Typhoon LSASS Memory Dump via comsvcs.dll or Procdump
id: 7c3a4e2b-9d5f-4b8a-9c1e-silktyphoon-lsass
status: experimental
description: Detects HAFNIUM/Silk Typhoon credential-theft tradecraft — LSASS dumping via rundll32+comsvcs.dll MiniDump, procdump.exe, or PowerShell MiniDumpWriteDump.
author: Detection Engineering
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/03/02/hafnium-targeting-exchange-servers/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0125/
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection_comsvcs:
    Image|endswith: '\rundll32.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'comsvcs.dll'
      - 'MiniDump'
  selection_procdump:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\procdump.exe'
      - '\procdump64.exe'
    CommandLine|contains: 'lsass'
  selection_powershell:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'MiniDumpWriteDump'
      - 'Out-Minidump'
      - 'Invoke-Mimikatz'
      - 'sekurlsa'
  filter_machine_acct:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (selection_comsvcs or selection_procdump or selection_powershell) and not filter_machine_acct
fields:
  - Image
  - CommandLine
  - ParentImage
  - User
  - Computer
falsepositives:
  - Sanctioned IR / forensics activity
  - Microsoft Defender ATP live-response sessions
level: high
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1003.001
  - attack.g0125
ucs.rationale: Microsoft DART, Volexity and Mandiant all documented HAFNIUM/Silk Typhoon dropping procdump and using comsvcs.dll MiniDump against LSASS as the standard credential-collection step after the ProxyLogon webshell. Bare LSASS-dump detections are common, but tying both the dump command-set AND the staged .dmp file under ProgramData/Temp/Public — and surfacing whether the parent chain involves w3wp.exe

_field_issues.message: `IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceFileEvents, DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?

_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
